feature: Claude Code Bypass Mode for hex-agent
description: When hex-agent is spawned inside a Claude Code session (CLAUDECODE=1), use `claude -p` subprocess instead of direct Anthropic API calls. Enables hex_plan_execute to work without vault credits.

phases.name: Detection
phases.description: Add Claude Code session detection function

tasks.name: Add is_claude_code_session() detection
tasks.description: Add fn is_claude_code_session() -> bool in hex-agent/src/main.rs. Returns true when env var CLAUDECODE=="1" OR CLAUDE_CODE_ENTRYPOINT is set. Add unit tests for both env var combinations and the negative case.

phases.name: ClaudeCodeInferenceAdapter
phases.description: Implement the bypass inference adapter using claude -p subprocess

tasks.name: Implement ClaudeCodeInferenceAdapter
tasks.description: Create hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/claude_code_inference.rs. Implement a struct ClaudeCodeInferenceAdapter with a method run_task(prompt: &str) -> Result<String, String> that: (1) finds `claude` binary via PATH, (2) spawns `claude -p <prompt> --output-format text` as a subprocess with the project dir as cwd, (3) captures stdout as the response, (4) returns Err if claude not found or exits non-zero. Add pub mod claude_code_inference to hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/mod.rs.

phases.name: Wire into main.rs
phases.description: Integrate bypass mode into hex-agent startup and one-shot execution

tasks.name: Add --no-claude-code-bypass flag
tasks.description: Add #[arg(long, default_value_t = false)] no_claude_code_bypass: bool to the Args struct in hex-agent/src/main.rs.

tasks.name: Bypass adapter selection at startup
tasks.description: In hex-agent/src/main.rs, after arg parsing: if is_claude_code_session() && !args.no_claude_code_bypass && which::which("claude").is_ok(), set a flag use_bypass=true and log 'Claude Code session detected — using bypass mode'. Then in the one-shot prompt path (args.prompt.is_some()): if use_bypass, call ClaudeCodeInferenceAdapter::new().run_task(&prompt) and print the result, then return Ok(()). This replaces the full AnthropicAdapter init for one-shot tasks.

tasks.name: Skip preflight in bypass mode
tasks.description: In hex-agent/src/main.rs, the preflight check calls the Anthropic API directly. Wrap the preflight block: if use_bypass { tracing::info!("Skipping preflight — Claude Code bypass active"); } else { /* existing preflight */ }. This prevents the 'credit balance too low' error from blocking bypass-mode spawns.

phases.name: Integration Test
phases.description: Verify end-to-end bypass works via workplan_executor

tasks.name: Test bypass detection and invocation
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] module in hex-agent/src/adapters/secondary/claude_code_inference.rs with: (1) test that run_task returns Err when claude binary not found, (2) test that is_claude_code_session() returns true with CLAUDECODE=1 env var set, (3) test that --no-claude-code-bypass flag prevents bypass selection.
